name: freelancers using QuickBooks processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For freelancers using QuickBooks processing 5–15 invoices/month, overdue invoices cause cash flow gaps. We provide timely alerts instead of manual tracking of invoices in spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Overdue invoices lead to cash flow gaps.
